name: HappySprout Kids Learning
description: Bilingual educational video platform for children aged 3-12. Browse curated videos, structured courses, and practice exercises.

skills.name: video_search
skills.description: Search educational videos by keyword, age group, or category

skills.name: course_browsing
skills.description: Browse structured learning courses with objectives and guided practice

skills.name: content_filtering
skills.description: Filter content by child age: 3-5, 6-8, or 9-12 years

skills.name: category_exploration
skills.description: Explore content by subject: English, Math, Science, Art, Music, Stories

skills.name: feedback_submission
skills.description: Accept and process user feedback and suggestions
